title: Remove faint watermark image from header and service sections

requirements.text: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the SiteHeader component

quotes: REMOVE/DELETE THIS IMAGE IN FAINT : IN HEADER

acceptanceCriteria: The header no longer displays any faint watermark background image
The header maintains its existing layout and styling without the watermark

requirements.text: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the ServicesPage component

quotes: ON BACKGROUND BELOW NAMES - Our Services

acceptanceCriteria: The Services page no longer displays any faint watermark background image
All service cards and content remain visible and properly styled

requirements.text: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the QualitySafetyPolicyPage component

quotes: ON BACKGROUND BELOW NAMES - Quality and Safety Policy

acceptanceCriteria: The Quality and Safety Policy page no longer displays any faint watermark background image
All policy content remains readable and properly formatted

requirements.text: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the MajorClientsPage component

quotes: ON BACKGROUND BELOW NAMES - Major Clients

acceptanceCriteria: The Major Clients page no longer displays any faint watermark background image
The client logos image remains visible without background watermark

requirements.text: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the MajorProjectsPage component

quotes: ON BACKGROUND BELOW NAMES - Major Projects

acceptanceCriteria: The Major Projects page no longer displays any faint watermark background image
All project cards and gallery images display without background watermark

requirements.text: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the GalleryPage component

quotes: ON BACKGROUND BELOW NAMES - Project Gallery

acceptanceCriteria: The Gallery page no longer displays any faint watermark background image
The project image grid displays cleanly without background watermark

requirements.text: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the EnquiryPage component (Contact Us section)

quotes: ON BACKGROUND BELOW NAMES - Contact Us

acceptanceCriteria: The Enquiry/Contact page no longer displays any faint watermark background image
All forms and feedback sections remain functional and clearly visible

requirements.text: Remove all watermark-related CSS classes (watermark-bg-primary, watermark-bg-light, watermark-bg-dark) from frontend/src/index.css
acceptanceCriteria: All watermark utility classes are removed from the CSS file
No watermark-related CSS remains in the codebase

constraints: Preserve all existing functionality and content on each page
Maintain current layout and styling aside from removing watermark backgrounds
nonGoals: Modifying content or text on any pages
